cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out which statement is true about Wu Jinyou based on the given text. First, I'll go through the options one by one. Option A says he is a graduate from Dalian Marinetime University. The text mentions Zheng Li as a student from that university, but there's no mention of Wu Jinyou being a graduate there. So A is probably incorrect. Option B claims he is the president of Dalian Marinetime University. Again, the text doesn't mention his position there. He is the head of the Polar Research Institute of China, but that's different from being a university president. So B is likely wrong. Option C states he thinks highly of the devotion and spirit of the Chinese researchers. In the text, Wu Jinyou says, "I hope the students have not only a field trip... but are also touched by the devotion and spirit of the Chinese researchers..." This shows he values their devotion and spirit, so
